question: How do I track my order?
answer: You can track your order by visiting our website and clicking on 'Track Order' in the top menu. Enter your order ID and registered email address. You'll see real-time updates including dispatch date, courier name, and expected delivery date. You can also track via the link sent in your shipping confirmation SMS/email.

question: My order status shows 'Processing' for 2 days. What does it mean?
answer: Processing status means your order has been confirmed and our warehouse team is preparing it for dispatch. This typically takes 24–48 hours on business days. If it stays in Processing beyond 48 hours, please contact our support team with your order ID and we'll investigate immediately.

question: मेरा ऑर्डर कहाँ है?
answer: आप अपना ऑर्डर हमारी वेबसाइट पर 'ऑर्डर ट्रैक करें' विकल्प से ट्रैक कर सकते हैं। अपना ऑर्डर नंबर और रजिस्टर्ड मोबाइल नंबर दर्ज करें। आपको रियल-टाइम अपडेट मिलेगी जिसमें डिस्पैच की तारीख, कूरियर का नाम और अनुमानित डिलीवरी तारीख शामिल होगी।

question: मेरा ऑर्डर कैंसिल हो गया है, पैसे कब वापस आएंगे?
answer: अगर आपका ऑर्डर कैंसिल हुआ है, तो रिफंड 5–7 कार्यदिवसों के भीतर आपके मूल भुगतान माध्यम पर वापस आ जाएगा। UPI और नेट बैंकिंग के लिए यह 3–5 दिन में और क्रेडिट/डेबिट कार्ड के लिए 5–7 दिन में होता है। अगर 7 दिन के बाद भी रिफंड नहीं आया तो हमसे संपर्क करें।

question: Mera order dispatch ho gaya hai kya?
answer: Aapka order dispatch hua ya nahi, yeh check karne ke liye apni registered email ya SMS check karein — humne ek tracking link bheja hoga. Agar nahi mila, toh website pe 'Track Order' section mein apna Order ID daalo. Dispatch hone ke baad 24 ghante mein courier tracking live ho jaati hai.

question: What is your return policy?
answer: We offer a hassle-free 15-day return policy from the date of delivery. Items must be unused, unwashed, and in original packaging with all tags intact. To initiate a return, go to 'My Orders', select the item, and click 'Return'. Our pickup agent will collect the item within 2–3 business days. Refund is processed within 5–7 business days after quality check.

question: Can I exchange a product instead of returning it?
answer: Yes! We offer free exchanges within 15 days of delivery. You can exchange for a different size or color of the same product, subject to availability. To request an exchange, go to 'My Orders', select the item, and click 'Exchange'. If the replacement item has a price difference, you'll either pay the extra amount or receive a store credit.

question: Which items cannot be returned?
answer: The following items are non-returnable for hygiene and safety reasons: innerwear and lingerie, customized or personalized products, items marked as 'Final Sale', perishable goods, and digital products. Additionally, items damaged due to misuse or missing original packaging may not qualify for returns. Please read the product page carefully before purchase.

question: वापसी कैसे करें?
answer: वापसी के लिए 'मेरे ऑर्डर' सेक्शन में जाएं, संबंधित आइटम चुनें और 'रिटर्न' बटन दबाएं। कारण बताएं और पिकअप की तारीख चुनें। हमारा कूरियर एजेंट 2–3 कार्यदिवसों में आइटम उठाने आएगा। प्रोडक्ट की जांच के बाद 5–7 दिनों में रिफंड आपके खाते में वापस आ जाएगा।

question: Return ke liye kya documents chahiye?
answer: Return ke liye aapko kisi document ki zaroorat nahi hai. Bas apna Order ID ready rakhein. Product original packaging mein hona chahiye, tags lage hone chahiye, aur product unused hona chahiye. Pickup ke time courier ko product box ke saath invoice bhi de dein agar available ho — helpful hoga lekin mandatory nahi.

question: My payment failed but money was deducted. What should I do?
answer: Don't worry — this is a common occurrence with UPI and card payments. If money was deducted but the order wasn't placed, it will be automatically refunded within 5–7 business days by your bank. Please check your bank statement first. If the amount hasn't been refunded after 7 days, contact us with your transaction ID and screenshot, and we'll escalate it with our payment gateway.

question: Which payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major payment methods: UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm, BHIM), Credit Cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, RuPay), Debit Cards, Net Banking (all major banks), EMI (on orders above ₹1,999), and Cash on Delivery (COD) for orders up to ₹5,000. COD carries a ₹49 handling fee. We do not currently accept cryptocurrency.

question: मेरा UPI पेमेंट फेल हो गया लेकिन पैसे कट गए
answer: चिंता न करें! UPI पेमेंट फेल होने पर कटे हुए पैसे आमतौर पर 5–7 कार्यदिवसों में अपने आप वापस आ जाते हैं। अगर 7 दिन बाद भी पैसे नहीं आए, तो अपना ट्रांजेक्शन ID और बैंक स्टेटमेंट का स्क्रीनशॉट लेकर हमसे संपर्क करें। हम आपके पेमेंट गेटवे के साथ मामला उठाएंगे।

question: COD (Cash on Delivery) available hai kya?
answer: Haan! COD ₹5,000 tak ke orders ke liye available hai. COD pe ek ₹49 ka handling charge lagta hai. Note karo ki kuch remote pincodes pe COD available nahi hoti — checkout ke time pincode enter karne pe pata chal jaayega. COD orders delivery ke time courier ko cash dena hota hai, UPI bhi accept karte hain courier partners.

question: How do I apply a coupon code?
answer: To apply a coupon code, add items to your cart and proceed to checkout. On the checkout page, you'll see a 'Apply Coupon' field. Enter your coupon code and click 'Apply'. Valid coupons will show the discount immediately. Note that coupons cannot be combined with other offers, and each coupon has specific terms (minimum order value, eligible categories). Expired or invalid codes will show an error message.

question: Do you deliver to my location?
answer: We deliver across 27,000+ pin codes in India. To check if we deliver to your area, enter your pincode on any product page or at checkout. We use a network of courier partners including BlueDart, Delhivery, Ekart, and DTDC to ensure maximum coverage. If your pincode is not serviceable, we'll notify you before payment and you won't be charged.

question: How long does delivery take?
answer: Delivery timelines depend on your location: Metro cities (Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Kolkata, Hyderabad) — 2–3 business days. Tier-2 cities — 3–5 business days. Remote or rural areas — 5–7 business days. Express delivery (next-day) is available in select metro pincodes for orders placed before 2 PM. Business days exclude Sundays and public holidays.

question: क्या आप मेरे शहर में डिलीवरी करते हैं?
answer: हम पूरे भारत में 27,000 से अधिक पिनकोड पर डिलीवरी करते हैं। अपना पिनकोड किसी भी प्रोडक्ट पेज पर या चेकआउट के समय डालें — आपको तुरंत पता चल जाएगा। हम BlueDart, Delhivery, Ekart और DTDC जैसे कूरियर पार्टनर के साथ काम करते हैं। अगर आपका पिनकोड सर्विसेबल नहीं है तो पेमेंट से पहले ही बता दिया जाएगा।

question: डिलीवरी कितने दिनों में होगी?
answer: डिलीवरी का समय आपके स्थान पर निर्भर करता है: दिल्ली, मुंबई, बेंगलुरु जैसे मेट्रो शहरों में 2–3 कार्यदिवस, टियर-2 शहरों में 3–5 कार्यदिवस, और ग्रामीण या दूरदराज क्षेत्रों में 5–7 कार्यदिवस। कुछ चुनिंदा मेट्रो पिनकोड पर अगले दिन डिलीवरी (एक्सप्रेस) भी उपलब्ध है।

question: Mera order kal tak aana tha, abhi tak nahi aaya
answer: Deri ke liye maafi! Pehle apne tracking link se latest status check karein. Kabhi kabhi courier delays natural reasons (weather, traffic) se hoti hai. Agar status mein 'Out for Delivery' hai toh aaj hi milega. Agar 'Stuck' ya 'Exception' dikh raha hai, toh hamare support se contact karein apna Order ID le ke — hum courier se escalate kar denge.

question: How do I care for cotton products?
answer: For cotton garments, we recommend machine washing in cold water (30°C or below) on a gentle cycle. Use mild detergent and avoid bleach. Turn garments inside out before washing to preserve color and print quality. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry in shade — avoid direct sunlight as it can fade colors. Iron on medium heat from the reverse side for printed items.

question: How should I wash silk or delicate fabric items?
answer: Silk and delicate fabrics require special care: always hand wash in cold water using a silk-specific or gentle shampoo-based detergent. Never wring or twist the fabric. Rinse gently and press out excess water with a dry towel. Lay flat to dry in shade. Do not tumble dry or hang dry as the fabric can stretch. For best results, dry clean is recommended for pure silk pieces.

question: कॉटन कपड़ों की देखभाल कैसे करें?
answer: कॉटन कपड़ों को 30°C से कम तापमान पर ठंडे पानी में मशीन वॉश करें। हल्के डिटर्जेंट का उपयोग करें और ब्लीच से बचें। रंग और प्रिंट बनाए रखने के लिए कपड़ों को उल्टा करके धोएं। धूप में नहीं, छांव में सुखाएं। प्रिंटेड कपड़ों को उल्टी तरफ से मध्यम आंच पर आयरन करें।

question: Product ka size guide kahan milega?
answer: Har product page pe 'Size Guide' button hota hai — wahan click karke detailed size chart dekh sakte ho. Hamare size chart mein chest, waist aur hip measurements dono inches aur centimeters mein hain. Agar aap between sizes ho, toh hamesha bada size lena better hota hai. Koi confusion ho toh chat pe pooch sakte ho aur hum suggest kar denge!

question: How do I store woolen or winter wear?
answer: Store woolen items clean (never store dirty) in breathable fabric bags or cotton pillowcases. Avoid plastic bags as they trap moisture. Place cedar blocks or lavender sachets to repel moths — avoid mothballs near skin-contact items. Fold woolen sweaters instead of hanging to prevent stretching. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct light. Air them out before use after long storage.

question: How do I reset my account password?
answer: To reset your password, click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. Enter your registered email address and click 'Send OTP'. You'll receive a 6-digit OTP on your email and registered mobile number. Enter the OTP, then create a new password (minimum 8 characters, must include one number and one special character). If you don't receive the OTP within 2 minutes, check your spam folder or click 'Resend OTP'.

question: How do I update my delivery address?
answer: You can manage your delivery addresses in 'My Account' → 'Saved Addresses'. To add a new address, click 'Add New Address' and fill in all required fields. To update an existing address, click 'Edit' next to it. Note: you cannot change the delivery address of an order that has already been dispatched. For pre-dispatch address changes, contact support immediately with your Order ID.

question: मेरा अकाउंट लॉगिन नहीं हो रहा है
answer: लॉगिन में समस्या के कई कारण हो सकते हैं: गलत पासवर्ड, गलत ईमेल, या अकाउंट अस्थायी रूप से बंद। पहले 'पासवर्ड भूल गए' से पासवर्ड रीसेट करें। अगर 'Account Suspended' दिखे तो हमसे संपर्क करें। अगर OTP नहीं आ रहा तो स्पैम फोल्डर चेक करें। फिर भी समस्या हो तो support@saharaai.in पर ईमेल करें।

question: क्या मैं अपना अकाउंट डिलीट कर सकता हूं?
answer: हाँ, आप अपना अकाउंट डिलीट कर सकते हैं। 'मेरा अकाउंट' → 'सेटिंग्स' → 'अकाउंट डिलीट करें' पर जाएं। ध्यान रखें: अकाउंट डिलीट होने के बाद आपका सारा ऑर्डर इतिहास, पते और स्टोर क्रेडिट हमेशा के लिए मिट जाएंगे। अगर आपके कोई पेंडिंग ऑर्डर या रिफंड हैं तो पहले उन्हें पूरा करें। यह प्रक्रिया अपरिवर्तनीय है।

question: Mera account kisi ne hack kar liya, kya karoon?
answer: Turant yeh steps follow karo: (1) 'Forgot Password' se apna password badlo. (2) Linked email ka bhi password change karo. (3) Hamare support ko call ya email karo taaki hum aapka account temporarily lock kar sakein. (4) Recent orders check karo koi unauthorized purchase toh nahi hui. Hum investigation karenge aur agar koi unauthorized transaction hua hai toh refund process karenge. Aapki security humari priority hai.
